role: Deputy Secretary, Supreme National Security Council (d. 17 March 2026)
bio: Ali Bateni served as Deputy Secretary of the [Supreme National Security Council](/orgs/supreme-national-security-council). He was killed on 17 March 2026 in the Israeli airstrike that also killed [Ali Larijani](/people/ali-larijani), [Morteza Larijani](/people/morteza-larijani), and [Alireza Bayat](/people/alireza-bayat), as part of the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).

sources.title: Iran's wartime leader isn't a dealmaker

editorial_notes: Killed 17 March 2026 in the Larijani strike. SNSC Deputy Secretary.
